action_text: Hover over a very small bar near the right end of the chart to show its tooltip
rationale: We need to read the exact count on one of the smallest bars to determine the minimum; hovering slightly left of the right edge should reveal a tooltip with the agent name and count.

action_text: Hover over another tiny bar near the right end to display its tooltip
rationale: Another nearby small bar may represent the minimum; hovering here increases the chance of revealing the lowest-value agent and count.

action_text: Hover over a small mid-right bar to reveal the agent and incident count
rationale: If the smallest bars are slightly further left, this hover should catch one; we need the tooltip to capture the agent name and incident count.

action_text: Hover over the rightmost small bar to check if it’s “Other” and see its count
rationale: The rightmost bar might be “Other”; confirming via tooltip helps us ignore it and focus on actual agents.

action_text: Open the chart options menu for the report
rationale: Opening chart options may provide a “Show data” view or table, which would list agents and counts directly, making it easier to find the minimum.
